pizzadaoDescription: is an international pizza co-op that's bringing the pizza industry onchain. We throw a global pizza party every year, arrange conference events every month, and support other organizers' meetups with pizza.
gppDefaultDescription:
On May 22, 2010, two pizzas changed the world. Laszlo Hanyecz paid 10,000 BTC to Jeremy Sturdivant to order him two pizzas. It was the first real-world Bitcoin transaction and the spark of a global movement.

Now, PizzaDAO invites you to the [Global Pizza Party](https://globalpizza.party), a worldwide celebration of Bitcoin Pizza Day across 500+ cities. Join us as we honor the slices that started it all.

What to expect:
🍕 Free pizza
🌍 A global celebration across 500+ cities
₿ Crypto enthusiasts and builders
💬 Great conversations, new friends, and good vibes

Whether you're deep in crypto or just here for a slice, this is your invitation to be part of history, again.

sponsorDescription.ens: (Ethereum Name Service) is the decentralized naming protocol that powers human-readable names on the internet. Instead of copying and pasting long, complex blockchain addresses, ENS lets you replace them with a simple, memorable name (like pizzadao.eth) that works across wallets, apps, and the decentralized web.
sponsorDescription.brave: browser is a fast, private and secure web browser for PC, Mac and mobile. Download now to enjoy a faster ad-free browsing experience that saves data.
sponsorDescription.wpc: is a U.S. based non-profit, multinational group of elite pizza professionals. Dedicated to educational outreach, community service, and promoting pizza!
sponsorDescription.ownTheDoge: is the community that collectively owns the iconic Doge meme, minted by Kabosu's owner Atsuko Sato, via $DOG. Holders can lock $DOG to mint "Doge Pixel" NFTs from the famous image.
sponsorDescription.swcEu: is a nonprofit advocating for clear, common-sense crypto regulations. If you believe in the power of blockchain and want the EU and your government to foster a positive business and policy environment for crypto assets and blockchain technology, make your voice heard.
